problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Rhizobium. Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
